umzug_muenchen.hero_desc: Stress-free moves into the Bavarian capital or from München to the world. FLOXANT offers a premium relocation service with a fixed price guarantee.
umzug_muenchen.intro_title: Moving in München – With a Plan and Precision
umzug_muenchen.intro_text_1: München is a vibrant metropolis that attracts people from all over the world. However, relocating within the Bavarian capital often presents a unique logistical challenge. Narrow staircases in Schwabing, a lack of parking in the Glockenbachviertel, or strict time windows in residential complexes: the conditions require experience and solid planning.
umzug_muenchen.intro_text_2: FLOXANT stands for a relocation service that masters precisely these challenges. We don’t just get to work blindly; we plan your change of location in detail. Our goal is for you to sit back and relax while we do the heavy lifting.
umzug_muenchen.transparency_text: FLOXANT has its legal headquarters in Regensburg. However, our operational team is regularly deployed for relocations in München and the surrounding area. We combine the flexibility of a national provider with the reliability you expect. Additionally, we routinely organize long-distance moves from München to North Rhine-Westphalia and all other federal states.

city.desc: Fast and efficient within the city limits. We know the routes and, if necessary, organize no-parking zones.

remote.desc: From the Isar to the Rhine or the Spree. Our long-distance moves are logistically optimized and safe.

umzug_muenchen.details_title: München Special: What You Need to Know
umzug_muenchen.details_text: Every city has its quirks, and München is no exception. The parking situation is tight in many districts. Establishing an official no-parking zone is often essential for a smooth process. We are happy to take care of the application with the München authorities on your behalf, complete with timely signage placement.
umzug_muenchen.remote_title: Relocating from Bayern to all of Germany
umzug_muenchen.remote_text: Many of our clients move for work from München to other metropolitan regions like Regensburg, Cologne, Frankfurt, or Berlin. Especially with such long-distance moves, professional planning is crucial. We ensure that your inventory is securely packed, insured, and arrives on time at the destination. Thanks to our regular routes between Bayern and NRW, we can often offer attractive partial load options or efficient direct transports.
umzug_muenchen.pricing_text: München is expensive enough – your move shouldn't ruin you financially. At FLOXANT, we rely on absolute cost transparency. Instead of vague hourly rates, you will usually receive a fixed-price offer from us. This includes all the services we have discussed in advance. No hidden fees for floor surcharges or travel distances.

features.inspection: Free Inspection: We will gladly assess your inventory in advance via a video call. This saves time and allows for a precise calculation.
features.insurance: Insurance Included: Your furniture is in safe hands with us and fully insured.
features.staff: Qualified Staff: Our employees are experienced, friendly, and work with care.

umzug_muenchen.cta_text: Start your request now. We will quickly prepare a non-binding offer for your move within, to, or from München.

faqs.q: How much does a move in München cost?
faqs.a: A local move in München costs between 400 and 2,000 euros, depending on the apartment size. FLOXANT offers binding fixed prices after a free inspection.

faqs.q: Does FLOXANT also handle moves in the old town of München?
faqs.a: Yes, we specialize in challenging logistics, such as narrow alleys or many stairs, and handle all no-parking zone requirements.

faqs.q: Do you offer long-distance moves starting from München?
faqs.a: Yes. We organize long-distance relocations from München to all of Germany.

faqs.q: Welche Risiken gibt es?
